projectDescription: A local-first cross-store game backlog manager that pulls your entire library across Steam, GOG, PlayStation, Epic, Xbox, and nine more storefronts into one unified dashboard — all running on your own machine, credentials never leaving your computer.
keyFeatures: Cross-store library aggregation across 12 stores (Steam, GOG, PSN, Epic, Xbox, Battle.net, Ubisoft, Nintendo, itch.io, Humble, EA, Amazon)
Local-only: all credentials and library data stay on your machine, never sent to a server
Connections tab: one-click browser-based sign-in with OS keyring + AES-GCM encrypted credential storage
Dashboard analytics: KPI cards, store/status/review donuts, genre charts, HLTB histogram, 300+ sabermetric stats
Wishlist deal radar with Claimable Now free-game feed (Epic, GamerPower, ITAD)
Auto-fetch on connect and auto-refresh for stale stores (24h threshold)
Enrichment pipeline: HowLongToBeat hours, ProtonDB tiers, Steam reviews, cross-store cover art
Multi-profile support with optional PIN gate and portable secrets bundle for moving machines
Optional $5/mo paid tier: background scheduled refresh, deep trophy sync, no sponsored deal cards
System tray launcher and PyInstaller BAKLOG.exe portable build
